name: The Flat Prisoner
description: Reframe a procedural 3D prison so distant surfaces connect in screen space, freeze that projection, and physically traverse the resulting 2D level.
natural_language: Reshape the projected level with the camera and guide the prisoner to the exit.

metadata.notes: The verifier independently rebuilds row-major view/projection matrices, derives the frozen edge graph, and fixed-step replays primitive camera and prisoner input. Browser inspection exposes only public 3D geometry and generic projection math—never the solution camera or route. Client topology, position, collision, and completion claims are not trusted.
